text.message: Should be a better game this time red. I recognize these names.
some one crash out and grief the whole time?
two players wouldnt cooperate against leader
best to get it over quick when you're being plowed on 3-3-3-6 score & making sub optimal blocks
this will be a game of optimal blocks dw
Think the bigger pet peeve to me is people that play the game like its solitaire
lol I knew it was coming
6-9-2 is pointless. no army play no road play
the the situation i want to be in at the start of the game
you can play devs just fine with wheat port
ppl in ranked overestimate port play so much
barely any ore in the board
the statistics show win percentage is way inferior
yeah but it gets all the youtube clicks
nothing wrong with bread butter ows
i think reds gonna take that wheat pile
I dont wanna leave all the board to the black tho
think taking anything except 6 11 12 is bad for you
yeah i was afk while game started lol
thats why i prefered 6311 for green
63 seemed like a reasonable out for blue
6-3-11 would have left open the 4-5-11 and 5-6-12
anyways. ima go 692 you can take the wheat pile :D
youre leaving blue with it lol
how do you win this red
black ur getting road here  arent u?
ur winning the race towarrds the middle
if they go middle theyre being greedy
and we'll have to see that blue doesnt accelerate too hard on devs
I think green needs to secure the port first
maybe they can try to race wheat port
leaves green with a fun choice
they prob win whatever race they decide but only 1 of 3
what of my moves suggests its an rb?
i need to ask for trades dont i?
dont plow me please i have objectively the worst setup here
i hope u guys will help me with wheat port
wanna punish for locking board lol
or can we add a future trade then black?
like wood for brick is just not doing a lot here
Idk what to say, i need the settle
if you guarantee you dont challenge it
im going for the wheat port
if i lose this port here my game is done
i have the least production and youre asking me to 2;1 lol
i hope we can get a deal so i can take the port
like ill still want to trade wheat 1:1 away
blue challenging wheat port makes no sense anyway
you are never porting wheat with their setup
we need to feed all cards here red
tragic thing is they prob have it anyway
no way u trade ur own plow
1. they arent giving their own port away
i want a 1% chance not a 0%
2. if u used common sense, 0 on the entire board
guys slower with the typing lol
i didnt think u would go for it tbh lol
i need a wheat trade then
then you can be mad at yourself instead
im pretty sure i recognize ur name from a stream blue
and u were pretty scammy there
beat dandy in a game yea
dont tell them who i am blue
im the guy that handed drew his nat title
i think for now its the 5. but we need to keep black in mind. they are the only one with road chances
i can tell u what it is
damn i was sure ud pull a knight
i can help u 4;1 instead red
i have a total of 1 more settle i can access
this makes my hand only stuck more
this is a very active game
was not expecting this for first thing in the morning lol
shoulda done the trade i offered
they were trying to settle + city
no city + road to not get plowed
i dont get it. u guys need me to balance the board
because if blue getts army pacing and black a city
i wont if someone gives me wood
im using my brick to settle 4;1
idk why ur hyping me up
1 vp is the 10 point win con for the road player
do u not see the 2 city person with open settle and a vp
i thought this was high elo
and i said for now blue was leading
how does that contradict what im saying?
bc ur hyping up my pos for no reason
5 was teh hit a while ago
who is getting army here since u want me on road?
and i hit them there for the 2nd time now
and red is being greedy and difficult
and i wont trade into a mono if i dont get a 2nd resource as well
u dont make brick, thought u might want
u can do 1:1 trades and we both can get value green
well u were asking for wheat and are on 6 points blue. if u think strong arming 3 points last place is the way to go
tbh i think i', behind red and black at this point
then enjhoy ur 27% winrate 1800 elo ceiling
i offered a trade hows that strong arming lol
and u tellinng me i should trade for brick because i dont make one
not the correct use of that word
it is. ur trying to pressure me into taking that trade
bit i open to be taught what it means?
i can do ns for ns
u guys need me to fight road right?
otherwise this smells like double play
then why the f didnt u block the blakc
Prilla: is just 1500 elo table talk
green just drop a road lmao
i got no army nor road
so ur at 8.. and 2 roads for win
i got no rolls for 2 roads
more likely they come now then
yeah im a double play threat for sure
i shouldve been deving this is true
both blue and red went BTT
and now u have army in hand
u dont want me to bc i win if i connect lol
yeah i think ur lying about your devs
this was not a game of optimal blocks lol
8 does nothing if ur scared of me winning with road lmao
red u KMing black for the one he gave you last game? :P
they drop a road for 9 bro
